case_title: PATRICIA CARAZO-RAMSEY VS. BENNETT STEINMULLER et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARAZO-RAMSEY, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEINMULLER, BENNETT $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED FOR BENNETT STEINMULLER, ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST EMILE DION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-22-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DION, EMILE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-06-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARAZO-RAMSEY, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEINMULLER, BENNETT DION, EMILE $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY BENNETT STEINMULLER, IS GRANTED. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY CARAZO-RAMSEY, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT STEINMULLER, BENNETT DION, EMILE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
